modmenu.summaryTranslation.multigolem: Material-based and Zombie iron golem variants with server-side gameplay.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.multigole: Adds Copper, Gold, Emerald, Diamond, Netherite, and Zombie variants of the vanilla Iron Golem, including configurable stats, abilities, village spawns, permissions, and marked spawn eggs. Server-side gameplay works for vanilla clients; modded clients get custom textures and item visuals.
